Type to search titles, headings, and page content.

Search is ready. Try a page title, a section heading, or a phrase from the content.

Documentation

This is the documentation for Marque. It is organized by goal, so you can jump to the section that best fits your needs.

Command Line Interface

Learn about the different commands that Marque provides and how to use them.

Open ➽

Configuration

Learn how to configure your site, from the default settings to navigation, layouts and themes.

Open ➽

Directives

Learn all about the custom .mq file, the extra syntax it supports, and custom Marque directives.

Open ➽

Don't know where to start?

I want to launch my site

Finish Quickstart.

Read Create Website so the starter folder stops feeling magical.

Use CLI Commands as your command reference.

I want to ✶ customise ✶ my site

Start at Configuration.

Go deeper with Frontmatter, Layouts, and Themes.

Use Navigation when the thing you want to change is the menu, not the page itself.

I want to make nice pages

Use plain markdown for the content that should stay plain.

Learn about directives to enhance the structure and style of your content.

I want to migrate an existing site

Start with the Migration overview.

Choose the mdBook or MkDocs guide.

Previous↩ Project ArchitectureNextCLI Commands ↪
Built with Marque
